evals.name: single-feature-development
evals.prompt: Implement user authentication functionality. Need login, logout, and session management.
evals.expected_output: SVN workspace created for feature development, authentication implementation completed, workspace merged to trunk after user approval

evals.name: parallel-tasks
evals.prompt: Please work on two tasks in parallel: 1) Fix the login bug, 2) Add user registration functionality
evals.expected_output: Two separate SVN workspaces created, each task completed independently in its own workspace, both merged to trunk after approval

evals.name: experimental-feature
evals.prompt: I want to try out a new UI library. Create a sample page using Svelte instead of React
evals.expected_output: Workspace created for experiment, Svelte sample page implemented, changes shown for review before merge decision
